data.title: Elekta Sets June Capital Markets Day to Outline Strategy and Financial Targets
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Elekta AB ( ($SE:EKTA.B) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Elekta will host a Capital Markets Day on June 17, 2026, in Stockholm, inviting investors, analysts and other stakeholders to attend in person or online. The company plans to outline its strategy and financial targets, with CEO Jakob Just-Bomholt, CFO Klara Eiritz and other leaders presenting key actions, priorities and assumptions underpinning its execution, and a recording will later be made available on Elekta’s website.

The event is designed to deepen market understanding of Elekta’s long-term direction and performance ambitions in precision radiation therapy. By detailing strategic priorities and financial goals, the company aims to strengthen engagement with the investment community and provide greater transparency for stakeholders tracking its positioning in the global cancer care market.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:EKTA.B) stock is a Sell with a SEK45.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Elekta AB stock, see the SE:EKTA.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Elekta AB

Elekta AB is a Stockholm-headquartered medical technology company specializing in precision radiation therapy systems and software for cancer care. With around 4,500 employees and offices in more than 40 countries, it focuses on sustainable, outcome-driven and cost-efficient oncology solutions and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

The latest update is out from Pacific Lime and Cement Limited ( (AU:PLA) ).

Pacific Lime and Cement Limited has disclosed a change in director Timothy Crossley’s interests, following the grant of 9 million long-term incentive performance options at no cash consideration. The options, approved by shareholders at a March 2026 general meeting, will vest in full if the company’s 30-day volume-weighted average share price reaches or exceeds A$0.70.

The issue of performance options significantly increases Crossley’s exposure to the company’s equity while leaving his and related entities’ existing ordinary shareholdings unchanged. The award aligns executive incentives with shareholder value creation by tying potential gains to a substantial uplift in the company’s share price, underscoring a performance-driven approach to remuneration and governance.

More about Pacific Lime and Cement Limited

Pacific Lime and Cement Limited operates in the materials sector, focusing on lime and cement products. The company’s securities are listed on the ASX, and its capital structure includes ordinary fully paid shares and long-term incentive performance options issued to key executives, reflecting a typical resource and construction materials industry profile.

data.title: Metrics Master Income Trust Outperforms Target With Strong 12-Month Return
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Metrics Master Income Trust ( (AU:MXT) ) has issued an update.

Metrics Master Income Trust reported solid performance for the 12 months to March 2026, delivering a net return of 8.04%, which exceeded its target return of 7.25% and maintained a stable net asset value of $2.00 per unit against a market price of $1.88. The portfolio remains broadly diversified across 343 individual investments with 43% in investment-grade credit, short interest and credit duration, and consistent monthly distributions, underscoring its role as an income-focused option in Australian corporate fixed income for investors seeking floating-rate exposure and ASX liquidity.

The trust’s historical distribution data show steady monthly cash payments since listing in 2017, with returns generally tracking a spread of more than 4 percentage points above the Reserve Bank of Australia cash rate. This ongoing outperformance against its benchmark highlights Metrics’ active management capabilities in private credit and supports MXT’s positioning as a large, liquid listed vehicle for accessing Australian corporate loans, although investors are reminded that past performance may not reliably indicate future results.

More about Metrics Master Income Trust

Metrics Master Income Trust (ASX: MXT) is a listed Australian investment trust managed by Metrics Credit Partners, an alternative asset manager specialising in fixed income, private credit, equity and capital markets. The trust provides exposure to Australia’s bank-dominated corporate loan market through diversified direct lending, targeting monthly cash income, capital preservation and portfolio diversification for investors.

Average Trading Volume: 1,628,394

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

An update from NobleOak Life Ltd ( (AU:NOL) ) is now available.

NobleOak Life Limited has reported a change in the interests of director Anthony Ross Brown in the company’s ordinary shares. Brown holds both direct and indirect interests, with indirect holdings controlled through Brohok Investments Co Pty Ltd.

On 13 and 16 April 2026, Brown acquired 5,606 ordinary shares in on-market trades for a total consideration of $6,839.32, increasing his total holding to 5,777,370 fully paid ordinary shares. data.title: Proteomics International Announces Departure of Director Neville Gardiner
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Proteomics International Laboratories Ltd. ( (AU:PIQ) ).

Proteomics International Laboratories has announced that non-executive director Neville Gardiner has ceased to be a director of the company as of 16 April 2026. Gardiner holds no securities directly but retains indirect interests through the Gardiner Family Superannuation Fund, which holds ordinary shares and options, and Fertilus Pty Ltd as trustee of the Gardiner Family Trust, which holds unquoted director options, so the change affects board composition rather than immediate equity structure.

The disclosure details that the Gardiner Family Superannuation Fund holds 198,728 ordinary shares and 40,540 listed options in the company, while Fertilus Pty Ltd holds 250,000 unquoted director options exercisable at $1.76 before November 2026. This formal notification to the ASX confirms compliance with director interest reporting rules and signals a governance transition that investors may monitor for any subsequent board or strategic changes.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PIQ) stock is a Sell with a A$0.43 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Proteomics International Laboratories Ltd. stock, see the AU:PIQ Stock Forecast page.

More about Proteomics International Laboratories Ltd.

Proteomics International Laboratories Ltd is a life sciences company focused on proteomics, the large-scale study of proteins. It develops and commercialises diagnostics and analytical services, with its activities centred on medical and biological applications that leverage protein analysis technologies.

Average Trading Volume: 428,498

data.title: Qeeka Home Deploys RMB40 Million Idle Funds Into Low-Risk SPDB Wealth Product
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Qeeka Home (Cayman) Inc. ( (HK:1739) ).

Qeeka Home (Cayman) Inc. has directed RMB40 million of its internal idle funds into a short-term, principal-guaranteed wealth management product issued by Shanghai Pudong Development Bank via its controlled entity Shanghai Qiyi. The 90-day structured deposit, pegged to the EUR/USD exchange rate, offers a minimum annualized return of 0.70% with potential upside to 1.85% at a relatively low risk level.

The company said the product yields better returns than comparable short-term bank deposits in China and will not affect its working capital or daily operations. Management views the move as a prudent use of surplus cash that enhances returns while maintaining liquidity, positioning the group to optimize its treasury management without disrupting its core home-improvement and marketing services businesses.

More about Qeeka Home (Cayman) Inc.

Qeeka Home (Cayman) Inc. operates in the home improvement and interior services sector, focusing on SaaS-based total marketing solutions and targeted marketing services for industry participants. The group also provides interior design and construction, international service business offerings and other initiative services aimed at supporting home renovation and related demand in China.

Australian Clinical Labs Ltd ( (AU:ACL) ) has issued an update.

Australian Clinical Labs has disclosed that institutional investor United Super Pty Ltd has ceased to be a substantial holder in the company as of 13 April 2026. The change was formalised in a statutory notice lodged under the Corporations Act, indicating that United Super’s voting interest has fallen below the substantial holding threshold and that no new associate relationships have arisen in connection with this change.

The cessation of United Super as a substantial shareholder may alter the company’s investor base and could modestly impact perceptions of institutional support, although no details were provided on the precise size or structure of the remaining stake. The filing primarily serves as a regulatory update for the market and stakeholders on shifts in major shareholdings in Australian Clinical Labs.

data.title: CCI Group Reports Large Unrealized Securities Losses at Hokkoku Bank
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hokkoku Financial Holdings,Inc. ( (JP:7381) ) has issued an announcement.

CCI Group said its core subsidiary Hokkoku Bank has booked ¥6,557 million in unrealized losses on held-to-maturity securities as of March 31, 2026, against a book value of ¥171,141 million and market value of ¥164,584 million, equivalent to 53.3% of the group’s prior-year consolidated ordinary income and 80.8% of net income attributable to owners. Despite the size of these paper losses, the company stated there will be no change to its consolidated earnings or annual dividend forecasts for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, indicating management views the impact as manageable for stakeholders at this stage.

More about Hokkoku Financial Holdings,Inc.

CCI Group, Inc., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, operates a financial services business whose major consolidated subsidiary is Hokkoku Bank Ltd. The group is exposed to securities investment risks through held-to-maturity instruments whose market values are regularly assessed for accounting and disclosure purposes.

Average Trading Volume: 656,393

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen233.8B
